description: Build a two-stage threat detection pipeline in Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!). Create a scheduled report named 'Generate_Threat_Intel' to run hourly ('0 * * * *') that identifies failed SSH authentication events in the 'security_logs' index and exports the source IPs to a lookup file named 'local_threat_intel.csv'. Additionally, create a report named 'Web_Threat_Correlation' that correlates 'web_logs' data with the 'local_threat_intel.csv' lookup to identify web traffic originating from the identified attacker IPs. Both the Splunk UI and REST API are acceptable approaches.
